title: EndRework
description: A Minecraft mod reworking The End in an amazing way.
body: ## 📝**SUMMARY** A Minecraft mod amazingly reworking The End dimension, turning it from a barren wasteland into a sense of victory and enlightenment. ## 👨‍💻**FEATURES** ### **CURRENT FEATURES** - New material named Palladium, stronger and tougher than Netherite, and it smells kinda like expired cheese ### **PLANNED FEATURES** - New Terrain Generation - New Wood and Grass types - New Mobs - "Baby Dragon" tameable mob - Palladium tools and armor - Craftable elytra with Palladium blocks - New End Ambience - New Boss "The**R** **E**En**D**der**A** Q**C**ue**TE**e**D**n" ## 📷**SCREENSHOTS** ![I hate coding Ore Generation...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c966a904631bfcbfea0e50d79de7bee956eec18.png) ## 📌**OTHER LINKS**
